domain.name: travel
domain.description: Travel planning tasks such as itineraries and multi-day trip schedules.

task.name: japan_10_day_trip
task.title: 10-Day Japan Travel Plan
task.description: A balanced 10-day itinerary covering Tokyo, Hakone, Kyoto, Nara, Osaka, Hiroshima, and Miyajima with cultural sites, city highlights, and travel logistics.

schema.name: itinerary
schema.description: Multi-day travel itinerary with ordered days, activities, and accommodation entries.

root_fields.title: 10-Day Japan Essentials: Tokyo to Miyajima
root_fields.summary: A 10-day route combining major cities, cultural experiences, natural scenery, and efficient travel connections for first-time or return visitors to Japan.

fields.name: Arrive at Narita/Haneda, transfer to hotel
fields.description: Clear immigration, take airport transfer to central Tokyo, check in or store luggage.

fields.name: Shinjuku stroll & observation
fields.description: Explore Shinjuku station area, visit Metropolitan Government Building for free city views and have dinner nearby.

fields.name: Tokyo hotel (Shinjuku or Shibuya area)
fields.notes: Choose convenient station access for subsequent travel.

fields.focus: Classic Tokyo neighborhoods and cultural sites

fields.name: Asakusa & Senso-ji
fields.description: Visit Senso-ji temple, stroll Nakamise shopping street for snacks and souvenirs.

fields.name: Ueno Park & Museums or Ameya-Yokocho Market
fields.description: Choose a museum (Tokyo National Museum) or explore market stalls and casual eats.

fields.name: Akihabara or Ginza depending on interest
fields.description: Electronics and anime culture in Akihabara or upscale shopping and dining in Ginza.

fields.name: Tokyo hotel (same area)

fields.focus: Onsen, views of Mt. Fuji, and scenic transport

fields.name: Travel to Hakone via Odawara/Shinkansen + local transport
fields.description: Take bullet train to Odawara, then Hakone Tozan Railway/cable car and sightseeing loop.

fields.name: Hakone Sightseeing: Open-Air Museum and Lake Ashi
fields.description: Visit Hakone Open-Air Museum and take a boat on Lake Ashi for views of Mt. Fuji (weather permitting).

fields.name: Ryokan or onsen hotel in Hakone (optional overnight)
fields.notes: Enjoy onsen and kaiseki dinner if staying overnight.

fields.focus: Transit day with evening Kyoto introduction

fields.name: Shinkansen to Kyoto
fields.description: Board bullet train from Odawara or Tokyo to Kyoto; check into accommodation and rest.

fields.name: Gion evening walk and Yasaka Shrine
fields.description: Stroll historic Gion district, glimpse traditional streets and Yasaka Shrine illuminated at night.

fields.name: Kyoto machiya or hotel near Kawaramachi
fields.notes: Central location for walking to major sites.

fields.name: Fushimi Inari Taisha early visit
fields.description: Beat crowds for the torii gate trail at Fushimi Inari.

fields.name: Kiyomizu-dera and Higashiyama district
fields.description: Explore the temple and charming historic streets leading to shops and tea houses.

fields.name: Arashiyama bamboo grove and Tenryu-ji
fields.description: Visit the bamboo grove, riverside area, and Tenryu-ji temple; consider boat or stroll.

fields.name: Kyoto hotel (same area)

fields.date_note: Day trip to Nara or more Kyoto
fields.focus: Deer park and Todai-ji or deeper Kyoto neighborhoods

fields.name: Nara: Todai-ji and Nara Park
fields.description: Meet free-roaming deer, visit the Great Buddha at Todai-ji, and stroll the park.

fields.name: Return to Kyoto: Philosopher's Path or tea district
fields.description: Walk the Philosopher's Path or visit smaller temples and cafes in the area.

fields.name: Kyoto hotel
fields.notes: Prepare for transfer to Osaka tomorrow.

fields.focus: City food culture and evening nightlife

fields.name: Short train to Osaka, check into hotel
fields.description: Move to Osaka and settle in near Namba or Umeda for best dining options.

fields.name: Dotonbori and Kuromon Market food crawl
fields.description: Taste takoyaki, okonomiyaki, and market specialties; enjoy neon-lit canal area at night.

fields.name: Osaka hotel (Namba/Umeda)
fields.notes: Stay central for next day's travel or Osaka castle visit.

fields.name: Osaka Castle and park visit
fields.description: Tour the historic castle and its museum, then walk the surrounding park.

fields.name: Afternoon options: Universal Studios Japan or shopping in Umeda
fields.description: Choose theme park fun or department store and underground shopping exploration.

fields.name: Osaka hotel
fields.notes: Prepare for early transfer to Hiroshima tomorrow.

fields.focus: Peace Memorial Park and Itsukushima Shrine

fields.name: Shinkansen to Hiroshima, visit Peace Memorial Park & Museum
fields.description: Spend time at the museum and memorial for reflection and history.

fields.name: Ferry to Miyajima and Itsukushima Shrine
fields.description: See the floating torii gate at low or high tide and stroll the island; try local oysters.

fields.name: Hiroshima or Miyajima ryokan/hotel
fields.notes: Overnight on island for sunset/sunrise views if desired.

fields.date_note: Return to Tokyo or depart from Kansai/Osaka

fields.name: Return travel: Shinkansen to Tokyo or transfer to Kansai Intl
fields.description: Allow ample time for transfers; consider direct shinkansen back to Tokyo or train/airport transfer for international flight.

fields.name: Last-minute city time depending on flight schedule
fields.description: If time permits, enjoy a final meal or short walk in departure city before heading to airport.

fields.name: Departure night or airport hotel (if needed)
fields.notes: Stay near airport if early flight; otherwise final night in Tokyo/Osaka.

user_facing.title: 10-Day Japan Trip — Quick Overview
user_facing.overview: A practical 10-day route from Tokyo to Miyajima balancing major sights, culture, food, and comfortable travel pacing.

sections.title: Trip Flow Summary
sections.summary: Start in Tokyo, enjoy a Hakone nature/onsen stop, then immerse in Kyoto culture before finishing with Osaka and Hiroshima/Miyajima.
bullets: Days 1-3: Tokyo highlights and Hakone day/overnight
Days 4-6: Kyoto and Nara cultural core
Days 7-9: Osaka urban food scene then Hiroshima/Miyajima

sections.title: Daily Pacing Advice
sections.summary: Mix busy sightseeing days with lighter travel or onsen/rest days to avoid burnout.
bullets: Plan mornings for top sites to avoid crowds
Reserve evenings for relaxed dining or neighborhood walks
Include one full rest or optional activity day (e.g., Universal Studios, Hakone onsen)

sections.title: Transport and Tickets
sections.summary: Use JR Pass for long-distance shinkansen legs and buy local tickets or IC card for city transit.
bullets: Consider a 7-day JR Pass activated for Kyoto-to-Hiroshima leg
Get a Suica/Pasmo or Icoca IC card for city trains and buses
Reserve shinkansen seats for peak travel days

sections.title: Accommodation Tips
sections.summary: Stay near major stations for convenience and experience at least one ryokan/onsen overnight.
bullets: Tokyo: Shinjuku/Shibuya for connectivity
Kyoto: Central Kawaramachi/Gion for walking access
Try a ryokan in Hakone or Miyajima for traditional lodging

sections.title: Food & Cultural Notes
sections.summary: Sample regional specialties and be mindful of local etiquette in temples, shrines, and public transport.
bullets: Try takoyaki and okonomiyaki in Osaka, oysters in Miyajima
Remove shoes where required and keep phone conversations low on trains
Carry cash for small vendors; many places accept cards but not all

sections.title: Final Departure Planning
sections.summary: Build buffer time for transfers and last-minute packing before your international flight.
bullets: Allow 3+ hours for airport transfer if departing same day as travel
Check luggage forwarding services if moving between many cities
Confirm flight check-in and customs timing the day before departure

domain.name: travel
domain.description: Travel planning tasks such as itineraries and multi-day trip schedules.

task.name: japan_10_day_trip
task.title: 10-Day Japan Travel Plan
task.description: A balanced 10-day itinerary covering Tokyo, Hakone, Kyoto, Nara, Osaka, Hiroshima, and Miyajima with cultural sites, city highlights, and travel logistics.

task_schema.name: itinerary_cs6
task_schema.description: Multi-day travel itinerary with ordered days, activities, and accommodation entries.
task_schema.hierarchy:
Itinerary (root)
    `-- Day (container, indexed by @index)
        |-- Activity (leaf)
        `-- Accommodation (leaf)
task_schema.syntax_rules:
- Paths start with /Itinerary
- Node types: Itinerary, Day, Activity, Accommodation
- Indices: Node[1], Node[-1], Node[1:3]
- Logical: AND / OR / not() combine predicates WITHIN brackets

domain_schema.name: travel_domain
domain_schema.description: Domain container for travel tasks with versions
domain_schema.hierarchy:
Travel_Root (root)
  `-- Task (container, indexed by @name)
      `-- TaskVersion (version, indexed by @number)

display.domain_schema:
name: travel_domain
description: Domain container for travel tasks with versions
hierarchy: "Travel_Root (root)\n  `-- Task (container, indexed by @name)\n      `--\
  \ TaskVersion (version, indexed by @number)"
nodes:
  Travel_Root:
    type: root
    fields: []
    children:
    - Task
  Task:
    type: container
    index_attr: name
    fields:
    - title
    - description
    - status
    children:
    - TaskVersion
  TaskVersion:
    type: version
    index_attr: number
    fields:
    - patch_info
    - conversation_history
    - created_at
    children: []
display.task_schema:
name: itinerary_cs6
description: Multi-day travel itinerary with ordered days, activities, and accommodation
  entries.
hierarchy: "Itinerary (root)\n    `-- Day (container, indexed by @index)\n       \
  \ |-- Activity (leaf)\n        `-- Accommodation (leaf)"
nodes:
  Itinerary:
    type: root
    fields:
    - title
    - summary
    children:
    - Day
  Day:
    type: container
    fields:
    - date_note
    - focus
    children:
    - Activity
    - Accommodation
    index_attr: index
  Activity:
    type: leaf
    fields:
    - name
    - time_block
    - description
    - highlights
    children: []
  Accommodation:
    type: leaf
    fields:
    - name
    - time_block
    - notes
    - highlights
    children: []
data_files:
  japan_10_day_trip: memory/travel/japan_10_day_trip.xml
default_data: japan_10_day_trip
examples_file: prompts/query_generator/domains/xpath_examples_itinerary_cs6.txt
syntax_rules: '- Paths start with /Itinerary

  - Node types: Itinerary, Day, Activity, Accommodation

  - Indices: Node[1], Node[-1], Node[1:3]

  - Logical: AND / OR / not() combine predicates WITHIN brackets'
display.memory_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" ?>
<Root>
  <Itinerary_Version number="1">
    <patch_info>cold start initialization</patch_info>
    <conversation_history>give me 10 days travel plan in Japan</conversation_history>
    <Itinerary>
      <title>10-Day Japan Essentials: Tokyo to Miyajima</title>
      <summary>A 10-day route combining major cities, cultural experiences, natural scenery, and efficient travel connections for first-time or return visitors to Japan.</summary>
      <Day index="1">
        <date_note>Arrival in Tokyo</date_note>
        <focus>Settle in and light exploration</focus>
        <Activity>
          <name>Arrive at Narita/Haneda, transfer to hotel</name>
          <time_block>Morning - Early Afternoon</time_block>
          <description>Clear immigration, take airport transfer to central Tokyo, check in or store luggage.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Smooth airport transfer</highlight>
            <highlight>First view of Tokyo neighborhoods</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Activity>
          <name>Shinjuku stroll & observation</name>
          <time_block>Afternoon - Evening</time_block>
          <description>Explore Shinjuku station area, visit Metropolitan Government Building for free city views and have dinner nearby.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>City skyline view</highlight>
            <highlight>Casual izakaya dinner</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Accommodation>
          <name>Tokyo hotel (Shinjuku or Shibuya area)</name>
          <time_block>Night</time_block>
          <notes>Choose convenient station access for subsequent travel.</notes>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Central location</highlight>
            <highlight>Easy train access</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Accommodation>
      </Day>
      <Day index="2">
        <date_note>Tokyo - East and Central</date_note>
        <focus>Classic Tokyo neighborhoods and cultural sites</focus>
        <Activity>
          <name>Asakusa & Senso-ji</name>
          <time_block>Morning</time_block>
          <description>Visit Senso-ji temple, stroll Nakamise shopping street for snacks and souvenirs.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Historic temple</highlight>
            <highlight>Traditional street foods</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Activity>
          <name>Ueno Park & Museums or Ameya-Yokocho Market</name>
          <time_block>Late Morning - Early Afternoon</time_block>
          <description>Choose a museum (Tokyo National Museum) or explore market stalls and casual eats.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Cultural museums</highlight>
            <highlight>Local market vibe</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Activity>
          <name>Akihabara or Ginza depending on interest</name>
          <time_block>Afternoon - Evening</time_block>
          <description>Electronics and anime culture in Akihabara or upscale shopping and dining in Ginza.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Pop culture or luxury shopping</highlight>
            <highlight>Evening dining options</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Accommodation>
          <name>Tokyo hotel (same area)</name>
          <time_block>Night</time_block>
          <notes>Rest before Hakone trip tomorrow.</notes>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Convenient departure</highlight>
            <highlight>Good transit links</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Accommodation>
      </Day>
      <Day index="3">
        <date_note>Day trip to Hakone (or overnight)</date_note>
        <focus>Onsen, views of Mt. Fuji, and scenic transport</focus>
        <Activity>
          <name>Travel to Hakone via Odawara/Shinkansen + local transport</name>
          <time_block>Morning</time_block>
          <description>Take bullet train to Odawara, then Hakone Tozan Railway/cable car and sightseeing loop.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Efficient shinkansen leg</highlight>
            <highlight>Scenic mountain transport</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Activity>
          <name>Hakone Sightseeing: Open-Air Museum and Lake Ashi</name>
          <time_block>Afternoon</time_block>
          <description>Visit Hakone Open-Air Museum and take a boat on Lake Ashi for views of Mt. Fuji (weather permitting).</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Art & nature</highlight>
            <highlight>Possible Mt. Fuji views</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Accommodation>
          <name>Ryokan or onsen hotel in Hakone (optional overnight)</name>
          <time_block>Night</time_block>
          <notes>Enjoy onsen and kaiseki dinner if staying overnight.</notes>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Traditional lodging</highlight>
            <highlight>Relaxing hot springs</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Accommodation>
      </Day>
      <Day index="4">
        <date_note>Travel to Kyoto</date_note>
        <focus>Transit day with evening Kyoto introduction</focus>
        <Activity>
          <name>Shinkansen to Kyoto</name>
          <time_block>Morning - Early Afternoon</time_block>
          <description>Board bullet train from Odawara or Tokyo to Kyoto; check into accommodation and rest.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Fast transfer</highlight>
            <highlight>Comfortable travel</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Activity>
          <name>Gion evening walk and Yasaka Shrine</name>
          <time_block>Evening</time_block>
          <description>Stroll historic Gion district, glimpse traditional streets and Yasaka Shrine illuminated at night.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Historic atmosphere</highlight>
            <highlight>Possible geisha sightings</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Accommodation>
          <name>Kyoto machiya or hotel near Kawaramachi</name>
          <time_block>Night</time_block>
          <notes>Central location for walking to major sites.</notes>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Traditional option available</highlight>
            <highlight>Good access to public transit</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Accommodation>
      </Day>
      <Day index="5">
        <date_note>Kyoto full day</date_note>
        <focus>Iconic temples and bamboo groves</focus>
        <Activity>
          <name>Fushimi Inari Taisha early visit</name>
          <time_block>Morning</time_block>
          <description>Beat crowds for the torii gate trail at Fushimi Inari.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Endless torii gates</highlight>
            <highlight>Morning light</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Activity>
          <name>Kiyomizu-dera and Higashiyama district</name>
          <time_block>Late Morning - Afternoon</time_block>
          <description>Explore the temple and charming historic streets leading to shops and tea houses.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Panoramic views</highlight>
            <highlight>Traditional crafts and snacks</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Activity>
          <name>Arashiyama bamboo grove and Tenryu-ji</name>
          <time_block>Afternoon</time_block>
          <description>Visit the bamboo grove, riverside area, and Tenryu-ji temple; consider boat or stroll.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Scenic nature spot</highlight>
            <highlight>Relaxed pace</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Accommodation>
          <name>Kyoto hotel (same area)</name>
          <time_block>Night</time_block>
          <notes>Rest; optional evening tea ceremony.</notes>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Central base</highlight>
            <highlight>Evening cultural options</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Accommodation>
      </Day>
      <Day index="6">
        <date_note>Day trip to Nara or more Kyoto</date_note>
        <focus>Deer park and Todai-ji or deeper Kyoto neighborhoods</focus>
        <Activity>
          <name>Nara: Todai-ji and Nara Park</name>
          <time_block>Morning - Afternoon</time_block>
          <description>Meet free-roaming deer, visit the Great Buddha at Todai-ji, and stroll the park.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Giant Buddha</highlight>
            <highlight>Friendly deer encounters</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Activity>
          <name>Return to Kyoto: Philosopher's Path or tea district</name>
          <time_block>Late Afternoon</time_block>
          <description>Walk the Philosopher's Path or visit smaller temples and cafes in the area.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Scenic walk</highlight>
            <highlight>Quiet temples</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Accommodation>
          <name>Kyoto hotel</name>
          <time_block>Night</time_block>
          <notes>Prepare for transfer to Osaka tomorrow.</notes>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Easy transit to next city</highlight>
            <highlight>Pack for short move</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Accommodation>
      </Day>
      <Day index="7">
        <date_note>Travel to Osaka</date_note>
        <focus>City food culture and evening nightlife</focus>
        <Activity>
          <name>Short train to Osaka, check into hotel</name>
          <time_block>Morning</time_block>
          <description>Move to Osaka and settle in near Namba or Umeda for best dining options.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Quick transit</highlight>
            <highlight>Vibrant neighborhoods</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Activity>
          <name>Dotonbori and Kuromon Market food crawl</name>
          <time_block>Afternoon - Evening</time_block>
          <description>Taste takoyaki, okonomiyaki, and market specialties; enjoy neon-lit canal area at night.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Street food heaven</highlight>
            <highlight>Iconic neon signage</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Accommodation>
          <name>Osaka hotel (Namba/Umeda)</name>
          <time_block>Night</time_block>
          <notes>Stay central for next day's travel or Osaka castle visit.</notes>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Central nightlife access</highlight>
            <highlight>Good train connections</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Accommodation>
      </Day>
      <Day index="8">
        <date_note>Osaka - optional day trip</date_note>
        <focus>Castle, shopping, or Universal Studios</focus>
        <Activity>
          <name>Osaka Castle and park visit</name>
          <time_block>Morning</time_block>
          <description>Tour the historic castle and its museum, then walk the surrounding park.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Historical landmark</highlight>
            <highlight>Nice photo spots</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Activity>
          <name>Afternoon options: Universal Studios Japan or shopping in Umeda</name>
          <time_block>Afternoon - Evening</time_block>
          <description>Choose theme park fun or department store and underground shopping exploration.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Family-friendly option</highlight>
            <highlight>Retail and dining choices</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Accommodation>
          <name>Osaka hotel</name>
          <time_block>Night</time_block>
          <notes>Prepare for early transfer to Hiroshima tomorrow.</notes>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Rest before long-distance travel</highlight>
            <highlight>Pack light for transit</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Accommodation>
      </Day>
      <Day index="9">
        <date_note>Travel to Hiroshima and Miyajima</date_note>
        <focus>Peace Memorial Park and Itsukushima Shrine</focus>
        <Activity>
          <name>Shinkansen to Hiroshima, visit Peace Memorial Park & Museum</name>
          <time_block>Morning - Afternoon</time_block>
          <description>Spend time at the museum and memorial for reflection and history.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Important historical site</highlight>
            <highlight>Reflective museum exhibits</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Activity>
          <name>Ferry to Miyajima and Itsukushima Shrine</name>
          <time_block>Late Afternoon - Evening</time_block>
          <description>See the floating torii gate at low or high tide and stroll the island; try local oysters.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Iconic torii gate</highlight>
            <highlight>Scenic island atmosphere</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Accommodation>
          <name>Hiroshima or Miyajima ryokan/hotel</name>
          <time_block>Night</time_block>
          <notes>Overnight on island for sunset/sunrise views if desired.</notes>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Scenic stay option</highlight>
            <highlight>Easy access to shrine</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Accommodation>
      </Day>
      <Day index="10">
        <date_note>Return to Tokyo or depart from Kansai/Osaka</date_note>
        <focus>Transit and departure preparations</focus>
        <Activity>
          <name>Return travel: Shinkansen to Tokyo or transfer to Kansai Intl</name>
          <time_block>Morning - Afternoon</time_block>
          <description>Allow ample time for transfers; consider direct shinkansen back to Tokyo or train/airport transfer for international flight.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Plan buffer time</highlight>
            <highlight>Final souvenir shopping</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Activity>
          <name>Last-minute city time depending on flight schedule</name>
          <time_block>Afternoon - Evening</time_block>
          <description>If time permits, enjoy a final meal or short walk in departure city before heading to airport.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Memorable final meal</highlight>
            <highlight>Relaxed departure pace</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Accommodation>
          <name>Departure night or airport hotel (if needed)</name>
          <time_block>Night</time_block>
          <notes>Stay near airport if early flight; otherwise final night in Tokyo/Osaka.</notes>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Convenient for flight</highlight>
            <highlight>Final packing time</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Accommodation>
      </Day>
    </Itinerary>
